case_title: MAI, MICHELLE VS TAMARA, MOUSTAFINA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAI, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAMARA, MOUSTAFINA $1,571.25 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,591.25, CALIFORNIA CASUALTY MANAGEMENT CO, DISMISS ON 2/20/98 PER FILED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TAMARA, MOUSTAFINA CALIF/CASUALTY MANAGEMENT CO.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CALIF/CASUALTY MANAGEMENT CO.
